criteria.good: Rails, PC/104 standoffs, payload bay, and board stack clearances are visible.
criteria.bad: CubeSat is a closed rectangular box with no internal assembly evidence.
criteria.loop_feedback: Add deployer rail guides, PC/104 standoffs, board stack slots, and payload bay inspection window.

criteria.good: Avionics, battery, antenna, and payload modules have removable trays or access panels.
criteria.bad: Electronics are hidden with no service path.
criteria.loop_feedback: Add removable avionics/battery trays, antenna slot, and labeled service cover geometry.

criteria.good: Design is an educational structural/electrical mockup and avoids flight qualification claims.
criteria.bad: Output claims deployer compliance, orbital readiness, or mission certification.
criteria.loop_feedback: State CubeSat as educational mock assembly; include inspection/readiness evidence, not flight certification claims.

criteria.good: Structure, power, avionics, comms, and payload are decomposed with simple mass/volume/power budget notes per module that sum consistently.
criteria.bad: Modules exist as shapes only, with no budget notes, or stated budgets contradict the geometry volumes.
criteria.loop_feedback: Attach mass/volume/power budget notes to each module and check the totals against the 3U envelope with stated margin.
